positive: A retro vaporwave illustration featuring a chrome sports car driving down a grid-patterned neon highway at sunset. Include palm trees and stylized Japanese text (for atmosphere, not readability). Synthwave aesthetic, highly saturated neon pink and turquoise colors, 8-bit pixel art influence.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic, natural light
